creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
I can not reproduce your problem on FreeBSD 8, FreeBSD9 and FreeBSD 10.

graphviz-2.36.0_6

The "config6" file is generated by the port/package.

dot -v
dot - graphviz version 2.38.0 (20140413.2041)
libdir = "/usr/local/lib/graphviz"
Activated plugin library: libgvplugin_dot_layout.so.6
Using layout: dot:dot_layout
Activated plugin library: libgvplugin_core.so.6
Using render: dot:core
Using device: dot:dot:core
The plugin configuration file:
        /usr/local/lib/graphviz/config6
                was successfully loaded.
    render      :  cairo dot fig gd map pic pov ps svg tk vml vrml xdot
    layout      :  dot
    textlayout  :  textlayout
    device      :  canon cmap cmapx cmapx_np dot eps fig gd gd2 gif gv imap imap_np ismap jpe jpeg jpg pdf pic plain plain-ext png pov ps ps2 svg svgz tk vml vmlz vrml wbmp x11 xdot xdot1.2 xdot1.4 xlib
    loadimage   :  (lib) eps gd gd2 gif jpe jpeg jpg png ps svg


Please provide more information how the creating of config6 fails.
What is your build environment.
Do you have forced assignments in /etc/make.conf?
e.g. CFLAGS=XXX
If so, please change them to CFLAGS?=XXX
